title: boesenbergia thorelii
intro: Boesenbergia thorelii, also known as pinang or lesser galangal, is a type of plant in the family Zingiberaceae, characterized by its short rhizomes and long-lasting flowers. The plant is rich in medicinal properties, containing compounds such as gingerols and shogaols, which have been found to have anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Boesenbergia thorelii include its potential to alleviate digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate pain, as well as its use in traditional medicine to treat various ailments. In terms of herbal preparations, Boesenbergia thorelii is often used in teas, infusions, and traditional medicine formulas, where it is typically combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
